title: pelargonium × dilectum
intro: Pelargonium × dilectum, also known as Cape Geranium or Red-Leaf Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Pelargonium. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × dilectum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
